title: sterculia glauca
intro: Sterculia glauca, also known as the Horse Radish Tree or Semal tree, is a deciduous tree native to tropical Asia, particularly in India and Southeast Asia. The plant's roots, seeds, and leaves are used in traditional medicine, exhibiting antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to treat various health issues such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Sterculia glauca include reducing inflammation, fighting bacterial infections, and regulating blood sugar levels, making it a valuable resource for natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Sterculia glauca include decoctions, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to create medicinal oils, creams, and powders for topical application and internal consumption.
